source: handcrafted, hand-computed from fees.bandedRates.grocery (aboveThreshold=15%) at $16 — paired with hc-grocery-referral-banding-at-or-below-15 to prove the banding transition (profit strictly lower above $15 despite a higher price, because the referral rate nearly doubles). NOTE: first draft wrongly expected verdict=pass (same mistake as the paired case) — real score is 70.3, just above the review threshold; fixed after re-deriving the full weighted score by hand. UPDATED 2026-07-11 (Full-crew audit): scoring.estimate_oa_profit_roi now subtracts inbound shipping-to-FBA (config.OA_INBOUND_SHIP_PER_LB, ~$0.60/lb — previously omitted entirely). At 1.0 lb that's -$0.60, flipping this candidate's profit negative (0.29 -> -0.31) and its score below SCORE_THRESHOLD (70.3 -> 66.0), so the correct verdict is now 'pass' (not worth a human review) rather than 'review'. The banding transition itself (8% vs 15% referral) is unchanged and still verified by the paired case.
